description: Doctor requests available drug samples, reviews options, and places an order.

turns.speaker: user
turns.message: Hello, this is Dr. Rivera from Rivera Cardiology. I am calling to see what Cardiolase samples I currently have available to order for my office.

turns.speaker: expected_system
message_traits: asks the doctor which product and quantity they want after listing availability
keeps the language procedural and order-focused

turns.speaker: user
turns.message: Please go ahead with 12 Cardiolase Starter Packs for Rivera Cardiology Associates.

turns.speaker: expected_system
message_traits: confirms the selected product and quantity
creates or confirms a sample order form
confirms shipping or fulfillment details from the verified record
does not offer products beyond the available limit
